signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Our personal loan borrowers' weighted average income is $168,000 with a weighted average FICO score of 747 — high-prime borrowers showing no acute stress signals in delinquency trends.
signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: Our on balance sheet 90-day personal loan delinquency rate was 64 basis points in the quarter, a decrease from 72 basis points in Q1 which is evidence of surpassing a peak — improving directionally but not yet normalized.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We will maintain a high rate relative to our competition… that doesn't mean we may not change it — suggesting rate leadership is conditional on competitive dynamics, not structural pricing power.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I could not be more confident in our ability to achieve our ambitions… I love what we have built — materially more bullish tone than cautionary language used in prior rate-environment commentary.
